title: GH #26: install.ps1 stages .codex-plugin; silence absent-plugin uninstall noise
action: 1) scripts/install.ps1:113 — add .codex-plugin to the sparse-checkout pattern list (skills .claude-plugin .codex-plugin docs/history/codex-harness-hardening). 2) Guard the repo-copy-mode removal calls (:208 codex plugin remove, :227 claude plugin uninstall) behind a presence probe: run `<cli> plugin list --json` first and only invoke remove/uninstall when its output contains bee@bee — never redirect native stderr (PS 5.1 constraint, comment at :104-106 stands). Keep the file pure ASCII. Commit: fix(installer): stage .codex-plugin on Windows sparse checkout (GH #26) [ghf-2].

truths: remove/uninstall only runs when plugin present
prohibitions: no change to plugin-first branch failure checks

verify: grep -q 'sparse-checkout set skills .claude-plugin .codex-plugin docs/history/codex-harness-hardening' scripts/install.ps1 && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash

trace.outcome: install.ps1 sparse-checkout stages .codex-plugin; codex/claude remove/uninstall calls guarded by a bee@bee presence probe
trace.verify_output: test_installers_e2e (bash): 19 passed, 0 failed (pwsh absent, bonus syntax check skipped)
trace.verify_command: grep -q 'sparse-checkout set skills .claude-plugin .codex-plugin docs/history/codex-harness-hardening' scripts/install.ps1 && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash

checks.evidence: install.ps1:113 diff adds .codex-plugin token; live grep SPARSE_OK
only 2> occurrence is the :104 comment; none introduced

install branches with Fail checks intact; only repo-copy else branch guarded
